law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euros] to one hundred [euros], or with one of these penalties alone.
If the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].

Art. 399. If the blows or wounds cause an illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a result, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].
The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros] if he acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The penalty shall be imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros] if the blows or wounds result in an apparently incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
The penalty shall be detention from five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  actedWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool
  causesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  causesApparentIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence: Person -> Bool
  causesDeathWithoutIntentToKill: Person -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int

  punishedArt398: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt399: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt400: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt401: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt398(p) <=> 
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & ~causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~causesApparentIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt399(p) <=> 
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~causesApparentIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt400(p) <=> 
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & causesApparentIncurableDiseaseOrSevereConsequence(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt401(p) <=> 
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) & causesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 183 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 26 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 100 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30 <=> punishedArt398(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365 <=> punishedArt398(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> punishedArt398(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt398(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 61 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 182 <=> punishedArt399(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095 <=> punishedArt399(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 100 <=> punishedArt399(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> punishedArt399(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt400(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMinEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt400(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMaxEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt400(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMinEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMaxEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475 <=> punishedArt401(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMinEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt401(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).

  ! p in Person:
    ~(? d in Int: fineMaxEuros(p) = d) <=> punishedArt401(p) & actedWithPremeditation(p).
}

case.text: Pieter and Karel have a conflict in a park. Pieter intentionally hits Karel several times with his fists. Karel sustains injuries: a broken nose and bruises on his face. Pieter did not act with premeditation. The injuries did not cause illness or incapacity to perform personal labor.

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Pieter is punished under Article 398.
No. Karel is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Pieter?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Pieter is 8 days.
